name: startup-team
description: Install a startup team as one goal-oriented Omniskills bundle: a startup-goal coordinator plus CEO, CTO, product manager, web-design lead, engineering manager, founding engineer, and QA lead.

loop.goal: Move an approved startup goal through evidence-backed feature milestones.

steps.title: Prepare the goal tunnel and feature milestones
steps.instruction: Clarify the goal tunnel, decompose it into ordered feature milestones, select the smallest accountable role set, and prepare manual input packets without launching any role.

steps.title: Collect and validate the milestone plan
steps.instruction: Accept completed expert outputs supplied by the user, validate their output packets and evidence ledgers, preserve material disagreements, and assemble the active milestone plan without rewriting expert conclusions.

steps.title: Approve the milestone plan
steps.instruction: Present the evidence-backed milestone plan, unresolved risks, assumptions, acceptance criteria, and exact implementation boundary; wait for explicit human approval.

steps.title: Implement the approved milestone
steps.instruction: Prepare and manually execute only the separately approved implementation handoff; remain inside the approved plan and record the changed artifacts and verification evidence.

steps.title: Repair the approved milestone implementation
steps.instruction: Apply one bounded repair for verification failures that remain inside the approved plan; return newly discovered requirements to planning instead of expanding scope.

steps.title: Verify the milestone result
steps.instruction: Prepare the QA handoff, accept the completed QA output supplied by the user, and record acceptance, regression, release-risk, and verification evidence without claiming an automatic role launch.

steps.title: Replay the verified user outcome
steps.instruction: After QA, prepare the accountable outcome role handoff for a User Outcome Replay; validate the returned expectations, needs, wishes, journey steps, evidence, and acceptance recommendation without performing the role's content analysis.

steps.title: Accept the feature milestone
steps.instruction: Present QA evidence and the User Outcome Replay, distinguish missed approved requirements from new wishes, and wait for explicit human acceptance, rework direction, or a later-milestone decision.
